Group Members

Ashesh Mehta

Role: Founder and Co-Director of the Lab. Director of Neurological Epilepsy Surgery. Professor of Neurosurgery Zucker School of Medicine at Hofstra and the Feinstein Institutes, Northwell Health.

Stephan Bickel

Role: Co-Director of the Lab. Attending Physician, Neurology/Epilepsy. Associate Professor of Neurology and Neurosurgery, The Feinstein Institutes, Zucker School of Medicine at Hofstra, Northwell Health.

Jose Herrero

Role: Assistant Professor at The Feinstein Institutes, Northwell.

Sabina Gherman

Role: PostDoc with Stephan

Background: PhD Cognitive Neuroscience, University of Glasgow (Philiastides lab)

Max Nentwich

Role: PostDoc with Stephan

Background: PhD Biomedical Engineering, City College of New York (Parra Lab)

Christine Chesebrough

Role: PostDoc with Stephan

Background: PhD Drexel University (John Kounios, Lila Chrysikou Labs), MA Columbia U, BA Johns Hopkins

Jules Granget

Role: PostDoc with Jose

Background: MA & PhD University of Lyon

Elizabeth Espinal

Role: Postdoc at Medical University of South Carolina, Visiting Scholar at HBMLab

Background: PhD in Neuropsychology, Drexel University (mentor Lila Chrysikou, co-mentor Stephan), BA Queens College, NY

Akash Mishra

Role: MD PhD Student (Mentors-Stephan, Ash)

Background: BS, Hostra University, NY

Samruddhi Anikhindi

Role: Research Assistant

Background: MS Biomed. Engineering, Georgia Inst. of Tech., Atlanta, GA

Noah Markowitz

Role: Research Assistant HBMLab, Grad Student at BU College of Engineering

Sarah Johnson

Role: Research Assistant HBMLab

Background: BS Microbiology, Miami University

Jessica Weber

Role: Research Assistant HBMLab

Background: MSc Biomed. Engineering, University of Pittsburg

Joshua Assi

Role: Research Assistant with Jose

Background: BS Neuroscience, Biophysics, Brown University
